Subscription billing and revenue operati: Subscription billing and revenue operations platform for managing customers and subscriptions.
Your Chargebee site subdomain. For acme.chargebee.com, enter acme.
Go to Settings > Configure Chargebee > A: Go to Settings > Configure Chargebee > API Keys and Webhooks > API Keys tab. Click Add an API Key, select Full-Access Key, and copy the generated key.
Create a subscription for an existing cu: Create a subscription for an existing customer using a Chargebee item price.
Cancel a Chargebee subscription immediat: Cancel a Chargebee subscription immediately, at end of term, or on a specific date.
Retrieve a customer from Chargebee by ID: Retrieve a customer from Chargebee by ID.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
Credit Option for Current Term Charges: Credit Option for Current Term Charges
The Chargebee item price ID to subscribe: The Chargebee item price ID to subscribe the customer to.
Whether to automatically charge the cust: Whether to automatically charge the customer. Defaults to the customer setting.
Number of billing cycles before the subs: Number of billing cycles before the subscription ends. Defaults to the item price setting.
UTC timestamp in seconds when the trial: UTC timestamp in seconds when the trial period ends. Set to 0 for no trial.
UTC timestamp in seconds when the subscr: UTC timestamp in seconds when the subscription starts. Defaults to now. Provide a past value to backdate.
A coupon ID or code to apply to this sub: A coupon ID or code to apply to this subscription.
Purchase order number to associate with: Purchase order number to associate with this subscription.
Customer-facing note added to all invoic: Customer-facing note added to all invoices for this subscription.
ID of the payment source to attach to th: ID of the payment source to attach to this subscription.
Invoice any charges raised at creation t: Invoice any charges raised at creation time immediately rather than adding them to unbilled charges.
Number of days within which invoices for: Number of days within which invoices for this subscription must be paid (Net D). Must match a value configured in Chargebee.
Key-value pairs to store extra informati: Key-value pairs to store extra information on the subscription.
When to cancel the subscription. Not app: When to cancel the subscription. Not applicable when the subscription has a contract term — use Contract Term Cancel Option instead.
UTC timestamp in seconds for when to can: UTC timestamp in seconds for when to cancel. Required when Cancel Option is "Specific Date".
Reason code from Settings > Configure Ch: Reason code from Settings > Configure Chargebee > Reason Codes > Subscriptions > Subscription Cancellation. Case-sensitive.
How to handle credits for current term c: How to handle credits for current term charges when canceling immediately.
How to handle unbilled charges when canc: How to handle unbilled charges when canceling immediately.
Required when the subscription has a con: Required when the subscription has a contract term. Determines when to cancel the subscription and contract term.
How to handle past due invoices when can: How to handle past due invoices when canceling immediately.
How to handle refundable credits when ca: How to handle refundable credits when canceling immediately.
Document date displayed on the invoice P: Document date displayed on the invoice PDF. Defaults to the current date. Provide to backdate the invoice.
When true, all subscription operations w: When true, all subscription operations will be disabled except deletion. This is irreversible.
The unique ID of the charge item price r: The unique ID of the charge item price representing the termination fee. Used only when the subscription has a contract term.
Quantity for the termination fee. Applic: Quantity for the termination fee. Applicable only for quantity-based item prices.
The termination fee in cents. For quanti: The termination fee in cents. For quantity-based items, this is the fee per unit.
Service period of the termination fee in: Service period of the termination fee in days, starting from the current date.
ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR). Requires Multi-currency pricing to be enabled.
Whether invoices should be automatically: Whether invoices should be automatically charged when possible.
Number of days within which the customer: Number of days within which the customer must pay their invoices.
Whether the customer can pay via Direct: Whether the customer can pay via Direct Debit.
The VAT/tax registration number for the: The VAT/tax registration number for the customer.
Specifies if the customer is liable for: Specifies if the customer is liable for tax.
A customer-facing note added to all invo: A customer-facing note added to all invoices for this customer.
Key-value pairs to store extra informati: Key-value pairs to store extra information on the customer.
Two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country co: Two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. US, GB).
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: HEAD
Triggers when a new subscription is crea: Triggers when a new subscription is created for a customer.
Triggers when a subscription is cancelle: Triggers when a subscription is cancelled.
Triggers when a subscription is successf: Triggers when a subscription is successfully renewed.
Triggers when a subscription is updated: Triggers when a subscription is updated — plan change, quantity, or add-ons.
Triggers when a payment is successfully: Triggers when a payment is successfully collected.
Triggers when a payment attempt fails. U: Triggers when a payment attempt fails. Useful for dunning and retry workflows.
Triggers when a new invoice is generated: Triggers when a new invoice is generated for a subscription.
Triggers when a new customer is created: Triggers when a new customer is created in Chargebee.
